description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a deep blue upholstered finish and a minimalist design. The sofa features a right-hand chaise extension, providing ample lounging space, and is supported by six cylindrical wooden legs with a light natural finish. The seat and back cushions are integrated into the frame, giving the sofa a clean, uniform appearance without visible seams or tufting. The armrests are straight, squared, and of equal height to the backrest, contributing to the sofa's boxy, contemporary silhouette. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. This piece would be suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or outdoor seating areas in neighborhoods.
description: A modern L-shaped blue sectional sofa with integrated cushions, straight armrests, and light wooden legs, featuring a clean, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, chaise extension, and the sofa's overall proportions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the straight, squared armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the arrangement of the six wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main seating area and the armrest on the left.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three integrated seat cushions and three integrated back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, forming a continuous sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, squared armrests present on both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a minimalist, unpadded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six cylindrical legs made of light wood, positioned at the corners and midpoints for support, exposed and evenly spaced, with a simple, block style.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, integrated with the armrests, with no visible segmentation or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue upholstery with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
